title: Interaction mode selection persists and is reflected when starting a scrape (scroll-driven)
description: Verifies selecting a non-default interaction mode is possible and starting the scrape proceeds with progress UI visible.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the website URL input field
Select "scroll-driven" from the interaction mode dropdown

title: Interaction mode selection persists and is reflected when starting a scrape (hover-driven)
description: Verifies selecting hover-driven mode is possible and the scrape can be started with live status areas present.

steps.description: Type "https://example.com" into the website URL input field
Select "hover-driven" from the interaction mode dropdown

title: Invalid URL validation blocks scrape and shows error message
description: Verifies malformed or unsupported URLs show a visible validation error and do not proceed to progress logging.

steps.description: Type "not a url" into the website URL input field
Click on the website URL input field
Type "https://example.com" into the website URL input field
Verify text "invalid URL" is not visible

title: Empty URL submission shows required/validation message
description: Verifies the user cannot start scraping without providing a URL and gets a visible validation message.

title: No-meaningful-changes fallback notice appears for Three.js canvas pages and finishes with warning plus retry option
description: Verifies the UI handles the "no meaningful changes detected" situation by showing fallback messaging and a warning outcome with retry option.

steps.description: Type "https://threejs.org" into the website URL input field
Select "static" from the interaction mode dropdown
Verify text "no meaningful changes detected" is visible

title: Meaningful change event is emitted when threshold + debounce conditions are met
description: Verifies the UI shows a meaningful change event only after the change threshold is exceeded and the debounce window settles, and that a bounding-box style crop region is produced/passed downstream.

title: User can cancel an active run and change detection stops updating
description: Verifies that canceling an active change-detection run stops further event/log updates and shows a canceled/stopped state.

steps.description: Verify text "Meaningful change" is not visible

title: Cross-origin canvas buffer access failure falls back to screenshot mode and is communicated to the UI
description: Verifies that when direct canvas buffer read is blocked, the UI indicates a screenshot-based fallback is being used for hashing/change detection.

steps.description: Verify text "Canvas buffer access blocked" is visible
Verify text "Using screenshot fallback" is visible
Verify text "May be inaccurate" is visible

title: Invalid target URL is rejected and run does not start
description: Verifies the UI validates the target URL and prevents starting change detection with an invalid URL.

steps.description: Verify text "Enter a valid URL" is visible
Verify text "Change detection" is not visible

title: Real-time extraction preview updates after a canvas change event
description: Verifies that when a change is detected, the UI shows an updated extraction preview reflecting the latest structured output.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Verify element "Extraction preview" contains visible JSON-like content

title: Token counter increments when new structured results are published
description: Verifies the token counter updates in real time as new vision snaps are processed and merged.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Verify element "Token counter" shows a numeric value
Wait for element "Token counter" value to change

title: UI indicates a snap failure after repeated invalid (non-JSON) model output
description: Verifies that when the pipeline cannot validate structured JSON after retries, the UI marks the snap as failed and continues running.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Wait for text "Failed" to be visible in the snaps/events list (or status area)
Verify text "Retry" is visible in the snap details or log area
Verify text "Running" is still visible after the failure indicator appears

title: Snap failure logs an error message without breaking the extraction preview UI
description: Verifies an error is surfaced for invalid JSON responses and the extraction preview remains accessible/visible.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Wait for text "Error" to be visible in the log/status panel
Verify element "Extraction preview" still shows visible content (not blank)
Verify text "Failed" is visible for at least one snap/event

title: Low-confidence results are flagged for manual review and still allow other items to merge
description: Verifies that decorative/incorrect labels are flagged for review while other high-confidence results continue to merge into the preview.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Wait for text "Manual review" (or "Review") to be visible in the extraction area or items list
Wait for text "labels" to be visible in the extraction preview
Verify at least one other non-flagged item/result is visible alongside the review flag

title: Confidence-check flag does not block subsequent snaps from updating token counter
description: Verifies that after a manual-review flag appears, the pipeline continues processing later snaps and token counter continues to change.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Wait for text "Manual review" (or "Review") to be visible
Verify element "Token counter" shows a numeric value
Wait for element "Token counter" value to change

title: Structured output shape remains consistent in UI after multiple updates (labels/values/descriptions/coordinates)
description: Verifies that the extraction preview consistently presents the expected fields across multiple snap updates.
category: Selective Vision Snap & Structured JSON Output (Layers 2 & 3)

steps.description: Wait for text "labels" to be visible in the extraction preview
Wait for text "values" to be visible in the extraction preview
Wait for text "descriptions" to be visible in the extraction preview
Wait for text "coordinates" to be visible in the extraction preview

title: Run Demo Mode pipeline from Demo Tile #1 and view final JSON output
description: Verifies the one-click demo flow for a curated demo site including prefilled URL/mode, pipeline progress indicators, token counter, and final structured JSON output.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 1"
Verify the dashboard shows a pre-populated demo URL

title: Run Demo Mode pipeline from Demo Tile #2 and verify output appears
description: Verifies that a second curated demo tile also preloads settings and produces a visible final structured JSON output with a token total.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 2"
Verify the dashboard shows a pre-populated demo URL

title: Switch between demo tiles updates the pre-populated demo URL before starting scrape
description: Verifies that choosing a different demo tile updates the prefilled demo URL and does not require manual input before scraping.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 1"
Verify the dashboard shows a pre-populated demo URL
Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 3"
Verify the dashboard shows a pre-populated demo URL

title: Token counter is visible while pipeline is running in demo mode
description: Verifies that after starting a demo scrape, a visible token counter is shown during the run (live feedback present).

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 1"

title: Pipeline progress shows snaps taken indicator during demo scrape
description: Verifies that the UI shows a snaps/progress indicator while the demo pipeline is running.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 2"

title: Demo site load failure shows a demo load error message
description: Verifies that when a demo site cannot be loaded (blocked resource or failure), the UI shows an explicit demo load error state.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 3"

title: From demo load error, user can try the next demo option
description: Verifies the recovery path from a demo load error by selecting an option to try the next demo and returning to a ready-to-run state.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 3"
Click the button labeled "Try next demo"
Verify the dashboard shows a pre-populated demo URL

title: From demo load error, user can view pre-recorded demo output
description: Verifies that when a demo fails to load, the user can still view a pre-recorded demo output including structured JSON and token total.

steps.description: Click the demo site tile labeled "Demo 3"
Click the button labeled "View pre-recorded output"

title: Run TestSprite core flow suite and view pass/fail summary
description: Verifies a developer can start the core TestSprite suite from the QA panel and see a completed pass/fail summary.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel

title: Verify core flow suite includes valid URL -> structured JSON out in logs
description: Verifies the core run surfaces log evidence that the valid scrape pipeline produced structured JSON output.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel

title: Verify token counter increment is reflected in core flow run logs
description: Verifies the core run indicates token usage increased during the scrape pipeline execution.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel

title: Open a failing core test log entry from the summary view
description: Verifies a developer can drill into failure details by clicking a failure log link from the TestSprite summary.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel

title: Run TestSprite edge case suite and confirm an invalid URL failure is reported
description: Verifies the edge case suite reports a failure for invalid URL scenarios and surfaces diagnostic information.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel

title: Edge case: oversized canvas timeout shows mitigation recommendation
description: Verifies a timeout failure for oversized canvas extraction includes a recommended mitigation (fallback to full-page snap).

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel
Verify text "fallback to full-page snap" is visible

title: Edge case: no meaningful state changes is detected and reported in logs
description: Verifies the edge case suite includes a scenario where no pixel-diff/state change occurs and that it is reported in logs.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel
Verify text "No meaningful state changes" is visible

title: Re-run TestSprite edge case suite after reviewing a failure and confirm a new run starts
description: Verifies a developer can re-run the edge case suite after inspecting failures, and the UI reflects a fresh run lifecycle.

steps.description: Click on "Test / QA" to open the Test / QA panel
